records.question: Where are the Traditional schools in district 0619540 led by Thompson with an average reading score exactly 486.0 and a math score at most 503.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.cdscode = frpm.cdscode
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.ncesdist = '0619540' AND schools.admlname1 = 'Thompson' AND schools.edopsname = 'Traditional' AND satscores.avgscrread = 486.0 AND satscores.avgscrmath <= 503.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.CDSCode
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds
WHERE s.DOC = '61'
AND s.District LIKE '%Thompson%'
AND sat.AvgScrRead = 486
AND sat.AvgScrMath <= 503
AND s.CDSCode LIKE '19%61954%'

WHERE schools.street = '2245 East 11th Street' AND schools.mailcity = 'Stockton' AND schools.county = 'San Joaquin' AND schools.school = 'James Urbani Institute of Language Development'
records.pred_sql: SELECT CDSCode FROM schools WHERE School = 'James Urbani Institute of Language Development' AND Street = '2245 East 11th Street' AND City = 'Stockton' AND County = 'San Joaquin'

records.question: Which schools have the phone number (760) 966-4000 and an average math score that is exactly 509.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.phone = '(760) 966-4000' AND satscores.avgscrmath = 509.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT schools.CDSCode
FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.Phone = '(760) 966-4000' AND satscores.AvgScrMath = 509

records.question: Which schools with a website exactly www.powayusd.com/pusdmces have a magnet value of at most 0.0?

records.question: Which Adult Education Centers in CA with the zip code 95448 were closed on 2010-07-01?

FROM schools

records.question: Which schools serving grades 9-12 have exactly 509 students enrolled in 12th grade?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.cdscode = frpm.cdscode
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE satscores.enroll12 = 509 AND schools.gsserved = '9-12'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.CDSCode
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds
WHERE s.GSserved = '9-12' AND sat.enroll12 = 509

records.question: Which schools in Lassen county, within the Fort Sage Unified district and located at 200 DS Hall with a mailing address of PO Box 35, opened on or before 1980-07-01 and have been updated since 2015-08-18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
WHERE schools.county = 'Lassen' AND schools.opendate <= '1980-07-01' AND schools.mailstreet = 'PO Box 35' AND schools.district = 'Fort Sage Unified' AND schools.streetabr = '200 DS Hall' AND schools.lastupdate >= '2015-08-18'

FROM schools

  AND StreetAbr = '200 DS Hall'
  AND MailStreet = 'PO Box 35'
  AND OpenDate <= '1980-07-01'
  AND LastUpdate > '2015-08-18'
